_provenance: Schema-derived from amendment B2 (High). Edge case: over-shoot when target_ticker absent from any symphony. When target reduction names a ticker (e.g. 'NVDA') that no candidate symphony holds, all candidates have exposure_usd[NVDA]=0; undershoot penalty fires at full target amount for that ticker on every symphony. The symphony with the best coverage on OTHER tickers still wins; NVDA miss is equal across all candidates.
description: Amendment B2 fixture: target names NVDA but no symphony holds NVDA. NVDA undershoot is equal for all; winner determined by other ticker coverage.

derivations.winner: sym-no-nvda-B scores 3100 < sym-no-nvda-A scores 3200. sym-no-nvda-B wins due to better SPY coverage despite NVDA miss being equal. NOTE: recheck expected — sym-no-nvda-B should win.
derivations.corrected_expected: selected_symphony_id should be sym-no-nvda-B (score 3100). Fixture corrected below.
